news.t: Six of the Best Small-Cap ETFs to Buy Now
Citi Supports the Industry's Largest Mutual Fund to ETF Conversion
Dimensional just converted $30 billion worth of mutual funds to ETFs. What it could mean for the industry

holdings.infoBox: DFAS is an equity ETF with a total of 2106 individual holdings. The top holdings are E-mini S&P 500 Future Sept 26 stock at 0.51%, TTM Technologies at 0.40%, Amkor Technology at 0.32%, BorgWarner at 0.30%, and DigitalOcean Holdings at 0.29%.

overview.description: The Dimensional U.S. Small Cap ETF (DFAS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively invests in small-cap US companies, selected using multiple factors and weighted by market capitalization. DFAS was launched on Dec 15, 1998 and is issued by Dimensional.
